title: myroxylon nitidum
intro: Myroxylon nitidum, also known as the Palo Santo tree, is a tropical tree species native to Central and South America. It is prized for its fragrant wood and resin, which possess medicinal properties attributed to its high content of cedrol and guaiacol compounds. The medicinal properties of Myroxylon nitidum include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which have been associated with various health benefits such as improved respiratory issues, reduced stress, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Myroxylon nitidum include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
